summary: Markdown [text](url) spans become Draft.js LINK entities, HTML comment lines never ship as article text, and an in-place update lane (articles update-md) reuses the create path's GraphQL composition instead of re-creating drafts.
reason: A live publishing session proved three runtime realities a regen must preserve: (1) X hyperlinks exist only as LINK entities - Mutable, UTF-16 entity_ranges, write data {url: <verbatim url, not t.co-wrapped>} ONLY: read-back of composer-authored drafts also shows an entityKey uuid, but that field is server-generated and ArticleEntityUpdateContent 422s (GRAPHQL_VALIDATION_FAILED) on any write that includes it - never copy read shapes into write payloads unverified; (2) body edits must go through ArticleEntityUpdateContent with the create path's exact variable shape {content_state: {blocks, entity_map}, article_entity} on the existing id - guessed shapes 422 and re-creating drafts mints duplicates; (3) UpdateContent replaces the whole body, so an update lane must preflight the draft's content_state and refuse on entity types the converter cannot reproduce. queryIds resolve through the article-ops table (X rotates them); a regen must re-discover current hashes, not enshrine these.
validated_outcome: Live smoke 2026-06-10 against the real X API (cookie lane, scratch draft 2064911522963607552). The smoke caught one real bug pre-ship: writing entityKey in LINK data (copied from read-back shape) 422s with GRAPHQL_VALIDATION_FAILED; fixed to write {url} only, after which create round-trips clean - LINK entity with verbatim url and correct UTF-16 range, HTML comment line absent, MEDIA entity bound (non-empty mediaId), TWEET entity persisted as data {tweetId} (server camelCases the written tweet_id). update-md round-trip on the same id: title and body replaced, both links present (old + newly added), image re-uploaded and re-bound, tweet entity intact, stale text gone, id unchanged, lifecycle stayed Draft. Entity preflight passed live on a LINK+MEDIA+TWEET draft (emit set LINK/MARKDOWN/MEDIA/TWEET/DIVIDER); the unknown-entity refusal is unit-tested (POLL case, zero mutations after refusal). Embed decision gate: TWEET entities are API-round-trippable through create AND update with tweet_id intact; rendering assumed good pending one visual check in the composer.
